benchmark_min_version_reason: Versions before 1.2.0 reject the benchmark config schema before making a provider request; 0.0.0 is a yanked placeholder without a usable vibe console script.

benchmark_exclusions.0.0.0: Yanked placeholder release installs no usable vibe console script.
benchmark_exclusions.2.6.0: Broken dependency metadata; requires an unavailable prerelease agent-client-protocol and fails to import MCP client support when prereleases are forced.

env.HIBENCH_MISTRAL_VIBE_CONFIG:
active_model = "gpt-5"
default_agent = "default"
enable_telemetry = false
enable_update_checks = false
enable_auto_update = false
enable_notifications = false
enable_connectors = false
vibe_code_enabled = false
narrator_enabled = false
voice_mode_enabled = false
enable_otel = false
api_timeout = 10

[experiments]
enable = false

[session_logging]
enabled = false

[[providers]]
name = "hibench"
api_base = "{base_url}"
api_key_env_var = "HIBENCH_MISTRAL_VIBE_API_KEY"
api_style = "openai"
backend = "generic"

[[models]]
name = "gpt-5"
provider = "hibench"
alias = "gpt-5"
temperature = 0.2
thinking = "off"
supports_images = false

capture.notes: The runner writes a clean Vibe config.toml under an isolated VIBE_HOME with a generic OpenAI-compatible provider whose api_base points at the local recorder. Telemetry, update checks, connectors, and remote Vibe Code are disabled so no Mistral account or upstream model call is required.
